title: Robert Mueller, ex-FBI chief who led Trump-Russia investigation, dies at 81
description: A former FBI director, Mueller led the high-profile inquiry into alleged Russian interference in the 2016 US election
content:
Robert Mueller, the former special counsel whose investigation into alleged Russian interference in the 2016 US election defined much of Donald Trump's first term in office, has died. He was 81.
The cause was not immediately known. CBS News, the BBC ... [1936 chars]

title: Trump threatens to send ICE to airports on Monday amid DHS funding standoff
description: President attacks ‘Radical Left Democrats’ after homeland security funding bill again sinks in Senate
content:
Donald Trump threatened on Saturday to deploy federal immigration agents to US airports on Monday if Democrats do not agree to measures aimed at strengthening security and immigration enforcement.

title: Robert Mueller, special counsel who investigated Trump-Russia ties, dies at 81
description: Mueller, who concluded Moscow had interfered in 2016 election, served as FBI director under Bush and Obama
content:
Robert Mueller, the former special counsel who investigated Russian interference in 2016 and links between Donald Trump and Moscow, has died, his family said on Saturday. He was 81.
A statement from Mueller’s family, relayed by the New York Times on ... [5544 chars]

title: Drug dealers use anti-slavery law to escape prosecution
description: Arrested teenage criminals who groom children into delivering heroin for county lines are claiming to be victims of exploitation themselves
content:
County lines drug dealers responsible for grooming children are being protected by a Home Office scheme designed to help victims of modern slavery.
An investigation has revealed abuse of the Home Office’s national referral mechanism (NRM), which was ... [8634 chars]

title: Rio Ferdinand shares what he finds ‘weird’ about Harry Maguire and Kobbie Mainoo’s England recall
description: Rio Ferdinand says its weird how Harry Maguire and Kobbie Mainoo are part of such a big England squad this month.
content:
Kobbie Mainoo and Harry Maguire both returned to the England set-up in this week’s friendly squad announcement, for the first time under Thomas Tuchel.
